indication: Phesgo is indicated for use in combination with docetaxel in adult patients with HER2-positive metastatic or locally recurrent unresectable breast cancer, who have not received previous anti-HER2 therapy or chemotherapy for their metastatic disease.
description: The European Medicines Agency (EMA) has authorized Phesgo (pertuzumab / trastuzumab) in combination with docetaxel for the treatment of adult patients with HER2-positive metastatic or locally recurrent unresectable breast cancer, who have not received previous anti-HER2 therapy or chemotherapy for their metastatic disease.
raw_therapeutics: Phesgo (pertuzumab / trastuzumab) in combination with docetaxel

document.name: Phesgo (pertuzumab / trastuzumab) [product information]. EMA.
